First Post!

Hello friend, welcome to my first post. I have always wanted to have a personal space, and I was going through github pages, and decided to make use of it and turn it into my blog. So here goes. ;)

Bangkok

Background: Sunyal, my friend from Mauritius back when I was still in university, was coming back to this region for a holiday. The three of us (myself, Shaun and Luke) decided to meet him at Bangkok for a 4 days 3 nights trip.

Day 1

Test Embed Image
